title: A clinical trial to study the effect of chemotherapy (FOLFIRI) with or without Sunitinib Malate in patients with metastatic cancer of colon/rectum.
inclusion_criteria: ?	Confirmed (histologically or cytologically) colorectal adenocarcinoma with metastatic disease. ?	Not received previous therapy for metastatic colorectal disease but for whom FOLFIRI treatment is clinically indicated. ?	Adequate organ function defined by blood test.
exclusion_criteria:
?	History of another primary cancer in the last 3 years. 
?	Previous full field radiotherapy within the last 4 weeks or limited field radiotherapy within 2 weeks of enrolling into the study. Or previous radiation treatment of more that 30% of the bone marrow. 
?	History of presence of brain metastasis, spinal cord compression carcinomatous meningitis or leptomeningeal disease.
locations: Seth Ramdas Shah Memorial Hospital & Research Centre
